# Bridger Western Wiki

> Complete wiki and survival guide for Bridger Western, a Roblox survival game set in Ridge B Valley. Covers stands, guns, cards, progression, and survival mechanics for the 2026 Alpha version.

This wiki provides comprehensive guides for Bridger Western players, including beginner tutorials, Stand acquisition methods, weapon tier lists, Moola farming strategies, and detailed game mechanics explanations.

## Core Content
- [Beginner Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/guides/beginner-guide.html): First hour gameplay, leveling, horse acquisition, and early milestones
- [How to Get Stands](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/how-to-get-stand.html): Corpse Part locations, KOTH events, and Stand acquisition methods
- [Gun Tier List](https://bridgerwestern.cc/weapons/gun-tier-list.html): Complete weapon rankings for PvP and PvE combat
- [Money Farming Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/progression/money-farming.html): Best Moola farming routes and strategies
- [Stand Tier List](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/stand-tier-list.html): Rankings of all Stands in the current meta

## Game Systems
- [Stands Database](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/): Complete Stand roster including The World, D4C, Killer Queen, Star Platinum
- [Weapons Database](https://bridgerwestern.cc/weapons/): All guns, stats, and PvP combinations
- [Cards System](https://bridgerwestern.cc/cards/): Tarot Cards mechanics, best cards, and build optimization
- [Cursed Techniques](https://bridgerwestern.cc/cursed-techniques/): JJK-inspired abilities including Jane Juliet Railgun builds

## Progression & Mechanics
- [Horse Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/progression/horse-guide.html): Horse stats, stamina, vitality, and traversal mechanics
- [Aging System](https://bridgerwestern.cc/guides/aging-system.html): Permadeath mechanics and Dog Bane healing
- [Controls Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/guides/controls.html): Complete control scheme and combat mechanics
- [Faction Choice](https://bridgerwestern.cc/guides/outlaw-or-inlaw.html): Outlaw vs Inlaw vs Vampire progression paths

## Locations & NPCs
- [Map Overview](https://bridgerwestern.cc/locations/map.html): Complete Ridge B Valley map and landmarks
- [NPC Locations](https://bridgerwestern.cc/locations/npc-locations.html): Bridgerman, Witch, and other important NPCs
- [Witch's Hut](https://bridgerwestern.cc/locations/witch.html): Dog Bane healing and aging reversal

## Tools & Calculators
- [DPS Calculator](https://bridgerwestern.cc/tools/dps-calculator.html): Weapon damage calculations and optimization
- [Route Optimizer](https://bridgerwestern.cc/tools/route-optimizer.html): Efficient farming and progression routes
- [Progression Forecaster](https://bridgerwestern.cc/tools/progression-forecaster.html): Character development planning

## Key Game Mechanics
- **Stands**: Obtained through Corpse Part KOTH events, no Stand Arrows available
- **Cards**: Cost 450 Moola per roll at abandoned town, human characters only
- **Aging**: Death permanently ages character, risk of permadeath after age 52
- **Combat**: Limb-based damage system with posture mechanics and blocking
- **Factions**: Three paths - Outlaws, Inlaws (both human), and Vampires (no cards)
- **Economy**: Moola farming through Dog Bane fishing, co-op methods, and Wipe & Drop strategies
